[2020-12-31 00:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): allow me to propose a pixie rework
[2020-12-31 00:44] awaclus: because other units contribute something worthwhile to the game, so it's worthwhile to try to get them to work
[2020-12-31 00:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): make it cost 3B, but construct 5 pixies over the course of 5 turns
[2020-12-31 00:45] awaclus: with Pixie, the work you're putting in is trying to get a unit that hardly does anything to do something
[2020-12-31 00:47] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): that seems like time well spent (you could gain more by making a unit 100% better, than making another unit 3% better or worst)
[2020-12-31 00:48] awaclus: we're not game designers, we're players
[2020-12-31 00:49] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): i don't even know what to say to that... then what's with all the talk about chnages to units?
[2020-12-31 00:49] awaclus: it's relatively easy for a player to play the game, notice that a unit is causing some kind of a problem, and suggest a way to fix the problem
[2020-12-31 00:50] awaclus: it takes a game designer to come up with something completely new
[2020-12-31 00:50] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): that's not 100% correct. i get what you meam, but isn't removing the unit coming up with something new?
[2020-12-31 00:51] awaclus: it's fixing a problem
[2020-12-31 00:51] awaclus: the problem: the unit takes up space in random sets
[2020-12-31 00:53] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): i think we're back to the beginning (it's not a problem because it's not jist taking space), which means I've been unsuccessful in convincing you.

I'll take the L, and leave it at that for now.
[2020-12-31 01:06] silentslayers: yeah exactly the point I was saying
[2020-12-31 01:06] velizar_ (Name): the argument is that it's not fun to have it in the set
[2020-12-31 01:07] velizar_ (Name): because it's too weak to matter most of the time, and when it does matter it's as blue sink, but there are other units which already do that while being more fun - Oxide.
[2020-12-31 01:09] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): i don't think we discussed "funness", but that would be even harder to justify
[2020-12-31 01:10] velizar_ (Name): it's easy to justify: if you asked several randomly selected people, and most of them said it's not a fun unit, then you can generalize it to the wider population
[2020-12-31 01:11] velizar_ (Name): also "creates difficult choices" and "creates complex situations" are what people have in mind.
[2020-12-31 01:12] velizar_ (Name): For pixie there are no difficult choices, it's just "buy it instead of floating the blue", and also "you're now allowed to buy some blastforges you can't afford to support, because you'll spend the blue on pixie, which is very inefficient but much better than wasting blue"
[2020-12-31 01:14] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): you could, but the hard part is selecting a group of people's who's opinions represents the wider population, that and the definition of fun in this context
